description: Returns information about a Session Manager session.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the session.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

SessionId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the session.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 96  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Target.description: The managed node to connect to for the session.
Target.markdownDescription:
The managed node to connect to for the session.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 400  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the session.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Connected | Connecting | Disconnected | Terminated | Terminating | Failed  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartDate.description: The date and time, in ISO-8601 Extended format, when the session began.
StartDate.markdownDescription:
The date and time, in ISO-8601 Extended format, when the session began.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Reason.description: The reason for connecting to the instance.
Reason.markdownDescription:
The reason for connecting to the instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^.{1,256}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Owner.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services user that started the session.
Owner.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Amazon Web Services user that started the session.
